g.text: FRONT ELEVATION — LOOKING US FROM AUDIENCE
on deck tops and DS floor.
Robe Pointe LED 330W Hybrid Moving Head (clone)
NOTES: All quantities subject to final advance confirmation. Deck leg sets include 4 legs each. PAR64 fixtures are floor-mounted unless noted.
Transport quoted as 1-way; confirm return logistics with venue. DMX via Elation Opto Splitter. All structural hardware: black finish.
